title: Malvern (Charles' leavers) & the Farm for Ed & Frankie's wedding

main_route.excerpt: We reached Malvern by 6.20. in time for the leavers' chapel service... We slept on the old nissen hut area again.
On the Farm for Ed's + Frankie's wedding at the Farm. Marvellous 200 people. House, then marquee, Cricket Stumps + teepee made by Kate + Jamie

unresolved.issue: Referred to only as 'the Farm'; teepee made by Kate + Jamie suggests this may be Kate & Jamie's farm (likely Herefordshire, as referenced in other diary trips), but exact location not named in diary.
unresolved.excerpt: On the Farm for Ed's + Frankie's wedding at the Farm. Marvellous 200 people. House, then marquee, Cricket Stumps + teepee made by Kate + Jamie

summary: A short two-night UK trip in July 2007: Simon and Eve drove to Malvern for Charles' school leavers evening, sleeping overnight on the school grounds. The next day they travelled to 'the Farm' for Ed and Frankie's wedding, a gathering of around 200 guests with a marquee and teepee, before returning home on the Sunday afternoon.
extraction_notes: Only two diary pages (B_0117_L and B_0117_R), both from the same spread. Dates are July 6-8 2007 (year inferred from context: Charles' leavers at Malvern College). 'The Farm' location is unresolved — the teepee being made by Kate + Jamie suggests it may be the same farm referenced in 1989/1995/2004 trips (Kate & Jamie's farm, likely Herefordshire), but no location is given in this entry. John was initially at home being babysat; William and Bryony drove him to the Farm for the wedding. No crossings or excursions.
